title: Consolidate RepoBrief daily artifact surface
goal: Define and migrate to the smallest RepoBrief/Lenskit artifact set needed for daily agent context while retaining full reports only for diagnostics and export.

acceptance.assertion: Actual Grabowski, Cabinet and LLM consumers are mapped to the exact fields and artifacts they read.
Manifest, context pack and freshness identity are either confirmed sufficient or replaced by a comparably bounded set.
Redundant formats are deprecated only after compatibility tests and a migration window.
Snapshot and export storage before and after consolidation is measured without weakening citation or freshness guarantees.
